name: Fruit Snow
recipeIngredient: 2 cans of frozen grape juice, 6 ounces each, thawed
1 can of frozen apple juice concentrate, 12 ounces, thawed
1 bottle lemon-lime flavored carbonated beverage, 32 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart nonmetal container, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well and cover.
3. Freeze the mixture.
4. Scoop the frozen mixture into dessert dishes.
5. Makes 14 servings of 1/2 cup each.
